title: sida aurantiaca
intro: Sida aurantiaca, also known as the orange mallow or yellow sida, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sida aurantiaca include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and swelling. Sida aurantiaca can be prepared into herbal remedies like decoctions, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
